title: Global Sourcing Optimization
description: Led supplier and microcontroller standardisation across multiple business units, building the cross-category strategic roadmap that underpinned the sourcing decision.
concept: Unlocked $9.5M+ in annual savings through targeted component standardisation, optimised sourcing strategies, and enhanced supply chain resilience — outcomes adopted in global design.

title: Cooking HMI Optimisation
description: Optimised the Human-Machine Interface architecture across the Cooking Products line — refining feature sets, removing over-engineered elements, and adding low-cost, high-impact differentiators.
concept: Approximately $25 per-product saving across the cooking portfolio; recognised with the Constellation of the Quarter award.

title: Refrigeration Launch Acceleration
description: Partnered with category leadership to compress the refrigeration launch timeline while reshaping the cost and sourcing posture.
concept: Delivered $1.5M in savings while accelerating market launch — aligning sourcing, design, and portfolio strategy with the launch window.

title: Executive Cost Transformation
description: Developed sourcing and architecture strategies for EVPs and C-suite — translating competitive intelligence into investable decisions.
concept: Multi-million-dollar savings via competitive market analysis, supplier optimisation, and operational efficiency improvements — $24.2M+ identified in total.
